title: Thurrock Council: Letter to Nicole Wood appointing her as Finance Commissioner
body: "‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚ÄãCopy of the letter from Max Soule, Deputy Director, Local Government Stewardship, at Department for Levelling Up, Housing and Communities to Nicole Wood, confirming the Secretary of State‚Äôs decision to appoint her as the Finance Commissioner to Thurrock Council under section 15(5) and (6) of the Local Government Act 1999. "
